title: senecio leucanthemifolius
intro: Senecio leucanthemifolius, also known as Tussilago farfara is a misidentified plant  and more accurately known as the Coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Coltsfoot include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Coltsfoot can be prepared as an herbal remedy through tea infusions, tinctures, or dried root preparations, which can be used to soothe coughs and alleviate respiratory congestion.
